_comment: Planning parameters driving the Boalo micro-parcel engine, the cessions ledger and the compliance checks. Every block carries a `status`: 'verified-law' = taken from regional law (citation in `source`); 'working-assumption' = plausible value pending the actual ficha in the El Boalo-Cerceda-Mataelpino NNSS — replace when verified.

cessions.source: Ley 9/2001 del Suelo CM, art. 36.6 (redes locales, zonas verdes, aparcamiento); reserva 30% VPP en suelo urbanizable (redacción vigente)

classification.current: PENDIENTE DE VERIFICAR — NNSS El Boalo/Cerceda/Mataelpino; el municipio está dentro del PRCAM (zonas A2/B1/P, Ley 1/1985 y 7/1991)
classification.instrumentIfSNU: Calificación urbanística (Ley 9/2001 art. 29) o modificación de planeamiento

Z1.note: Compact 2-storey volumes on a tight strip — GFA ≈ 2× su banda de suelo; el resto del programa de llegada queda en Z5

program._comment: BYLD program brief v0.4 — refined from the deck v0.3 envelope recorded in sites.json (boalo-estate.masterplan). These targets DRIVE the micro-parcel engine; the on-map ledger reconciles achieved vs target so any shortfall is visible, not hidden. builtM2 = designed gross floor area; landM2 = ground the engine reserves for the item; footprint (builtM2/floors) feeds the open-land check.

items.name: Landscape hotel
items.note: Linear building three cells deep on the uphill side of the upper road, looking E/SE over the lane to the valley. Conditional amenity — underwrite €130–200 ADR / <50% occupancy per the commercial thesis; not the exit.

items.name: Spa & farm-to-table restaurant
items.note: Compact cluster terraced into the slope over three levels where the access road bends uphill — shares the arrival core and the basement parking with the hotel. Deck value carried as an envelope CEILING: over-scaled vs boutique comps, right-size at proyecto básico.

items.name: Branded residences
items.note: 27 units on residential streets branching downhill from both road legs. Lot sizes derive from unit GFA / 0.35 edif. Counts and mix from deck v0.3 (5,392 m² residential ⇒ Echo 140 + Duo 220 + Grand 350 ≈ 5,340 m²).

unitMix.siting: oak line, mid-slope — long bar along the street

items.name: VPP village
items.note: Linear village along the entry lane’s south frontage — the corner most connected to the town road. Land sized from 3,524 m² / 0.6 edif. Keeps the residential VPP share ≈ 40% ≥ statutory 30% (Ley 9/2001).

items.name: Equestrian & farm
items.note: Rectangular paddock on the flattest contiguous meadow window, biased to the east meadow; light timber structures only.

exclusions.perimeterBufferNote: Franja perimetral sin edificación: autoprotección incendios (INFOMA) + retranqueo a viario (Calle Berrocal). Solo usos verdes/viario.
exclusions.protectionPolygonsNote: Añadir aquí polígonos [lat,lng] de vías pecuarias, arroyos (DPH) o zonificación PRCAM cuando se verifiquen.
